title: autojoin
description: Makes the client join to a local server on startup
body: # autojoin This mod connects the client to a localserver **(127.0.0.1:25565)** This mod is useful for making custom clients and launchers. The mod is Client-side only and for fabric For example I made this mod to use it in a custom launcher that creates a server and uses mindcraft to make an AI connect to the server, so I used this mod to make the player connect to the server without having to go to multiplayer and adding the server Credits for the icon: Server icons created by Freepik - Flaticon
